heading: Acceptance of voluntary services and money or property
label: 2501 Acceptance of voluntary services and money or property

L. 100–630, title III, § 301(b)(3)102 Stat. 3316Nov. 7, 1988In clause (2), the words “in the name of the Committee”, “in furtherance of this resolution”, “real, personal, or mixed, tangible or nontangible”, and “by gift, devise, bequest, or otherwise” are omitted as unnecessary.
